examples.en: fold all the clothes neatly

meaning: 형. ❶ 주목할 만한, 눈에 띄는 ❷ 유명한, 중요한

examples.en: notable improvements
many notable economists

meaning: 형. ❶ 눈을 뗄 수 없는, 강렬한 ❷ 설득력 있는

examples.en: approve a plan to build a shopping center

regarding the fuel efficiency of its vehicles
report to the security desk immediately upon arrival
sign up for a guided tour of the facility
keep all confidential documents secure
complete annual evaluations

meaning: 동. ❶ 작동하다, 가동되다 ❷ 운영되다, 운영하다

examples.en: operate laboratory equipment
operate only in the spring and fall

meaning: 명. ❶ 명소, 명물 ❷ 매력

examples.en: the most popular tourist attractions

meaning: 명. 신입 사원 / 동. ❶ 모집하다, 뽑다 ❷ (팀 등을) 구성하다

recruit seven additional customer service representatives

remove all previous versions of the software

examples.en: choose to stay at a nearby hotel

meaning: 형. 개연성 있는, (어떤 일이) 있을 것 같은

examples.en: halfway through the first draft of the manuscript

meaning: 명. 이동, 변화, 과도기 / 동. 이동하다, 변천하다

a very informative presentation at the conference
